bead.title: cleanup: collapse agent_usage.go aggregators to monthly-shard reader (~300 LOC dead)
bead.description:
Per /tmp/agent-surface-dead-code-audit.md: aggregateUsage, aggregateUsageAggs, readUsageSessionRecords (~300 LOC in cli/internal/agent/agent_usage.go) were superseded by monthly-shard reader (commit 99033c89) but the old aggregators were left behind. No production callers; tests exist but are testing dead code.

Independent of refactor (no overlap with try/work package split).
bead.acceptance: 1. Dead aggregators removed from cli/internal/agent/agent_usage.go (or file deleted entirely if everything is dead). 2. Their test functions removed. 3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green. 4. cd cli && go build ./... green. 5. Audit re-run shows ~300 LOC reduction in cli/internal/agent/.
